context.projectOverview: Phase 6 — The Medical Team. This sprint (S5) adds Apple Health export ingestion via STREAMING SAX (handles ~4GB XML without loading into memory) behind an IngestionNormalizer + adapter registry, plus a `bober medical import <file>` CLI command. Idempotent re-import via the S4 HealthDataStore dedup.

completedSprints.title: HealthDataStore + NumericsQueryLayer
completedSprints.summary: 907bae4 — upsertObservations(observations) INSERT OR IGNORE returns NEW-row count; HealthObservation{id,metric,value,unit,tStart,tEnd?,source}. AuditEntry has an 'ingest' event ready.

criticalConstraints: ADD the `sax` dependency (pure-JS streaming XML parser; no native build). It is NOT currently installed. Run `npm install sax` (and `npm install -D @types/sax` if types are needed). This dependency is justified and in-scope (the architecture mandates SAX streaming for the ~4GB Apple Health case). Keep the sax import ISOLATED to the AppleHealthAdapter file only.

AppleHealthAdapter MUST stream-parse via createReadStream + SAX with BOUNDED (~1000-row) batches and pause/resume BACKPRESSURE: on reaching the batch cap, PAUSE the read stream, await the sink write, then RESUME. NEVER read the whole file into memory (no readFile/readFileSync of the XML). A test must assert the batch-size cap and that createReadStream (not a whole-file read) is used.

IngestionNormalizer + IngestionAdapter registry + ObservationSink: importFile(file) selects the adapter whose canHandle(file) returns true; throws a CLEAR error naming the problem when NO adapter canHandle the file. ObservationSink wraps HealthDataStore.upsertObservations.
Idempotent re-import: a second import of the same file adds 0 NEW rows (rely on S4 HealthDataStore INSERT OR IGNORE dedup). A test asserts second-import new-count === 0.

`bober medical import <file>` CLI command: register mirroring the existing pattern (registerFactsCommand in src/cli/commands/facts.ts + src/cli/index.ts wiring). It must be callable and report an IngestionResult (counts) on completion.
Map Apple Health <Record> attributes to HealthObservation: type -> metric, unit -> unit, value -> value (number), startDate -> tStart (ISO). Follow the briefing's exact mapping.

ESM/NodeNext .js extensions; strict TS; no SDK types outside src/providers/. Tests use a small fixture XML in a temp dir (NO real 4GB file, NO fs mocks). Add IngestionResult/IngestionAdapter/ObservationSink types additively to src/medical/types.ts.
Do NOT wire ingestion into the SOP engine. nonGoals: NO egress/full SOP (S6), NO retrieval (S7), NO Whoop/CSV adapters (Apple Health XML only; the registry makes others additive later).
